pageContext.name: Batman
pageContext.description: From the new film The Batman Batman (Bruce Wayne) joins the S.H.Figuarts lineup.  Standing approximately 6 inches tall, this 1:12 scale Batman action figure includes a cloth cape with integrated posing wire and an unmasked face portrait of Bruce Wayne featuring the black paint around his eyes as seen in the film. Both faces use Tamashii Nations' Digital Printing technology to capture the actor's likeness in fine detail. Other included accessories are the Bat Knife that forms from his chest emblem, handcuffs, grapnel launchers, and the adrenaline pen.  Add to your DC Comics collection today.
